issues.description: The first action uses FlipLife which adds Life to hand, but it should be optional (the text says 'You may'). There is no optional flag on this action.

The second action uses ReturnToHand which returns a card to hand, but the effect should add the opponent's Character to the top or bottom of opponent's Life cards face-up. This is fundamentally the wrong action type - it should be AddLife targeting an opponent's Character.
The effect text allows choosing top OR bottom for the Life card taken to hand, but FlipLife doesn't have a position parameter to specify this choice.
The effect allows choosing top OR bottom for where to place the opponent's Character in their Life, but the DSL doesn't capture this choice.
The second action is conditional on the first action being performed ('You may... : Add...'), but there's no dependency link between them in the DSL.
